d:
Yeh jungle toh safe hai, par yeh log? Bilkul nahi!

Welcome to the Jungle is a Hindi movie starring Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Arshad Warsi, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Jacqueline Fernandez, Disha Patani, Paresh Rawal, Johnny Lever, Rajpal Yadav, Tusshar Kapoor and Shreyas Talpade in prominent roles. It is directed by Ahmed Khan.
